caution.text: CAUTION: Pulley bolt to 60 N·m (44 lb.ft.).
CAUTION: Do not suck on canister valve. Fuel vapor inside canister is harmful.
CAUTION: Confirm that snapring is installed in groove securely.
CAUTION: Confirm that snap ring is installed in groove securely.
CAUTION: Use of any other bolts than specified one is prohibited.
CAUTION: Left case plate to 7 N·m (5.0 lb.ft.)
CAUTION: Counter shaft nut to 70 N·m (52.0 lb.ft.).
CAUTION: Be careful not to pinch synchronizer ring spring by hub.

important.text: IMPORTANT: ALWAYS USE SG QUALITY ENERGY CONSERVING II OILS OF PROPER VISCOSITY
IMPORTANT: Bearing cap nuts to 35 N·m (26 lb.ft.).
IMPORTANT: Always follow the label procedures when adjusting timing.
IMPORTANT: Crankshaft should be aligned at top dead center.
IMPORTANT: Securely support the transaxle with a suitable jack before removing.
IMPORTANT: Use of magnet would facilitate removal of guide ball (Figure 24).
IMPORTANT: Install oil seal spring side towards case.
IMPORTANT: Apply adhesive to back of water deflector before installation.
IMPORTANT: The front wire is longer than the other three.

note.text: NOTE: MARKED WITH * ARE STANDARD SCREWS. ALL OTHERS ARE TAPPING SCREWS.
NOTE: • Housing bolts to 12 N·m (9 lb.ft.).
NOTE: *Not all items are used on all engines.
NOTE: CLEAR CODES AND CONFIRM NO "CHECK ENGINE" LIGHT.
NOTE: IF CODE 42 IS STORED, GO TO THAT CODE FIRST.
NOTE: Driven gear for abnormal wear or distortion.
NOTE: Case bolt to 6 N·m (4 lb.ft.).

NOTICE: Care should be exercised not to damage pulley when tapping off.
NOTICE: Do not reuse five washers.
